---
project:
  type: website

website:
  title: "About me"
  navbar:
    left:
      - href: index.qmd
        text: Home
      - href: about.qmd
        text: About
      - href: MachineLearningProject1.ipynb
        text: ML Project

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    title-block-banner: true
---

**About Me**

Hi, I'm Raphael Siewen. I'm a Data Science student with a minor in Economics.

**Skills:**

I'm proficient in R code, Python, SQL, and some cloud computing. I have a good understanding of economics and the business cycle. I'm good at working in a group setting, and I love learning and sharing new ideas with my peers.

**Interests:**

I'm interested in socioeconomic and psychology. The ways in which humans interact with one another and the impact of social structures on the human psyche. I am also interested in how human personality grows and changes over time.

**Projects I worked on:**

[Machine Learning Project](MachineLearningProject1.ipynb)

**Resume**:

[Resume](Resume.pdf)
